mapper.select: SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY current_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic WHERE circle_id = #{circleId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY current_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic WHERE status = 1 AND publish_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 24 HOUR) ORDER BY current_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO topic (circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status) VALUES (#{circleId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{publishTime}, #{currentScore}, #{interactionCount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE topic SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, circle_id, title, content, author_id, publish_time, current_score, interaction_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM topic ORDER BY current_score DESC
